# `vendors.min.js` goes in THIS folder

The `(protected)` layout loads `/legacy/pcs/vendor/js/vendors.min.js` —
the legacy jQuery v3.4.1 + Popper.js + Bootstrap v4.3.1 bundle.

The transcription agent could not stage it (sandbox blocks copies from the
legacy source path; the file exceeds the read-tool cap). **Integrator: copy it
verbatim** — see `../VENDOR-COPY-MANIFEST.md`.

```powershell
Copy-Item "C:\xampp\htdocs\pcscargo\member\assets\js\vendors\js\vendors.min.js" `
          "$PWD\public\legacy\pcs\vendor\js\vendors.min.js"
```

Until then the `<script src>` 404s harmlessly — `(protected)` pages still
render, just without the legacy Bootstrap-4 `data-toggle` interactivity.
This placeholder may be deleted once the real file is in place.
